name: Tabbouleh with Raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, pour boiling water over bulgur just enough to cover. Let set for 20 minutes until the water is absorbed and bulgur is tender.
2. Drain excess water from bulgur and squeeze out any remaining water using your hands.
3. Add sliced scallions, chopped parsley, and fresh lemon juice to bulgur. Mix well, then add the remaining ingredients and blend.
